description_long: This object is a large, rounded sausage encased in a smooth, pinkish casing with subtle seam lines running lengthwise. The front and back display a prominent red and white label reading 'McGarty's Royal Brand Sausages' with additional text below, suggesting a commercial or novelty food product. The casing is slightly glossy and appears to be made of synthetic material, likely plastic or cellophane, typical for processed sausages. The sausage is plump and uniform in shape, with no visible grill marks, toppings, or signs of being cooked. The overall appearance is clean and well-sealed, indicating it is intended for sale or display rather than immediate consumption. The object is placed directly on a flat, neutral surface with no additional packaging or container visible.
description: A large, pink sausage with a smooth casing and a bold red and white 'McGarty's Royal Brand Sausages' label, appearing clean and commercially packaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full 'McGarty's Royal Brand Sausages' label and the central red and white stripes.
description_view_1: Side/top view displaying the rounded, seamless pink casing with faint seam lines and minimal label visibility.
description_view_2: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the same label and stripes visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side/top view, again showing the smooth casing and seam lines, with label details mostly obscured.
attribute_brand_label: McGarty's Royal Brand Sausages McGarty & Co. Ltd.
